name: I have back problems already and forklift at work made it worse can I claim?
description: Comp covers aggravation; get doctor to link to accident.[3]

mainEntity.name: I have back problems already and forklift at work made it worse can I claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp covers aggravation; get doctor to link to accident.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions from job accidents.** Prove the forklift incident worsened it.[3] Key factors: Medical expert opinion on causation essential; imaging compares before/after. Utah covers if employment contributed.[3] Disclose history honestly.
